name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
summary: Meta Platforms, Inc. builds technology for human connection and communication. Its Family of Apps includes Facebook, Instagram, Messenger, and WhatsApp, enabling people to connect, share content, and build communities. Meta also develops augmented and virtual reality hardware and software under its Reality Labs segment, including VR headsets and AI glasses, and is investing heavily in artificial intelligence to power transformative experiences across its platforms.
